case_title: RACHEL EZIRIM VS. BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF REMOVAL (SUBMITTED BY T.M.RYAN - ATTORNEY OF DEFENDANT) FILED BY DEFENDANT SETERUS, INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANT SETERUS INC. WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SOPHIA MAJEED--MORTGAGE RESOLUTION SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EZIRIM, RACHEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,095.00, PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT, SETERUS INC. IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
